task_1.key_decision: Nullable Boolean fields with null defaults; legacy 5-arg constructor preserved
task_1.for_next_tasks: BridgeStatus now has 4 new Boolean? fields (screenInteractive, keyguardLocked, appForeground, pictureInPicture). All null-default, kotlinx.serialization. Task 3 must populate these in status(); Task 4 must mirror them in MCP DTO.

task_2.key_decision: AtomicInteger counter + WeakReference<Activity>; Robolectric tests (Mockito not on classpath); underflow-guarded pause
task_2.for_next_tasks: Task 3 reads isAppForeground() to populate appForeground, and lastResumedActivity()?.isInPictureInPictureMode for pictureInPicture. Same lifecycle callbacks instance must be passed both to Application.registerActivityLifecycleCallbacks and into FixThisBridgeRuntime.

task_3.key_decision: AndroidBridgeEnvironment promoted from private to internal for Robolectric test access. status() uses as? for system services so missing services yield null (per spec §5.3). isInPictureInPictureMode is safe — sample minSdk=24.
task_3.for_next_tasks: BridgeStatus payload now contains the 4 fields populated from real Android signals. Task 4 must consume this payload via bridge.status(packageName) on the MCP side. The protocol payload is JSON; field names are the BridgeStatus constructor names verbatim.

exposed_apis: ConsoleAvailabilitySignals (data class with screenInteractive/keyguardLocked/appForeground/pictureInPicture/rootsCount, all nullable except rootsCount which is Int?)
task_4.key_decision: READY-branch only call to bridge.status(packageName); legacy/fail → null via swallow. CancellationException rethrown.
task_4.for_next_tasks: Console state.connection.availability mirrors this DTO field-for-field. Task 6 reads it. Field names are the contract — never rename. rootsCount is the Int? from BridgeStatus (already on every status payload, even legacy).

task_5.key_decision: Plain function declarations (no module/IIFE) for bundler concatenation. Plan's `rootsCount === 0` form chosen over spec's `?? 1` (test-equivalent, simpler). Bundler entry inserted after connection.js so downstream modules see the symbols.
task_5.for_next_tasks: Task 6 instantiates `createBlockedReasonDebouncer({delayMs: 300})` and `createUnresponsiveTracker({threshold: 3})` once per session. Task 6 calls `tracker.observeFailure()/observeSuccess()` and reads `tracker.isUnresponsive()`/`tracker.nextBackoffMs()`. Composes with `state.connection.availability` payload from Task 4.

task_6.key_decision: Heartbeat polling converted from setInterval(HeartbeatIntervalMs) to recursive setTimeout(unresponsiveTracker.nextBackoffMs()) with `heartbeatPolling` boolean gate to prevent .finally() re-arming after stop. recomputeInteractionBlockedReason() shared between success and catch paths. blockedReasonDebouncer + unresponsiveTracker are module-scope singletons in state.js.
task_6.for_next_tasks: Task 7: read state.connection.interactionBlockedReason in render hook. Task 8: gate canvas pointer handlers in annotations.js using state.connection.interactionBlockedReason !== null. Task 9: read interactionBlockedReason for chip suffix. Task 10: read previousBlockedReason for transition detection (already initialized to null in state.js).

phase_summaries_log.scope: Sidekick: BridgeStatus + 4 availability fields wired through Application/PowerManager/KeyguardManager/lifecycle. 61 sidekick tests passing, 0 regressions vs baseline. CHANGELOG deferred to Task 12 per plan.

task_12_split.automated: Step 1 build, Step 4 CHANGELOG, Step 5 full unit + JS tests, Step 6 commit
task_12_split.manual_user: Step 2 launch console, Step 3 walk 8 manual scenarios on physical device
